title: WERNNSAI Blue Video Game Party Tablecloth - 2 PCS Game Birthday Party Decorations for Kids Boys Blue Gamer Party Rectangle Table Cover for Gaming Night Geek Game Party Supplies 54’’ x 108’’
features: GAMER PARTY TABLECLOTH - The gamer tablecloth is printed with cool gaming elements, neon sign, video game controller patterns, words “level up” and “go win”. Will easily lights up your party, creating an exciting and relaxing gaming party atmosphere

TABLECLOTH SIZE & MATERIAL - Decorate your video game party in style with gaming tablecloth. Measuring 54’’ x 108’’, made of thickened material, waterproof and oil-proof. No bad smell, can keep the table from getting dirty

SAVE YOUR TIME - This video game table cover is easy to wrap and clean. You can also just throw the tablecloth away after your family dinner. Save you more time, and enjoy theme party with your family and friends

VIDEO GAME PARTY DECORATIONS - Accommodate up to 8 adults or 12 children, the gamer rectangular table cover is not only suitable for video game party, but also boys gaming night, kids gamer birthday party, geek game theme party
WIDE OCCASIONS - The blue game theme tablecloth is also ideal for family gathering, friends reunion, children classroom activities, holiday and anniversary party, outdoor picnic and summer camping
